name: Eggnog Molded Salad
recipeInstructions:
1. In a small bowl, combine the gelatin and water; set aside.
2. Drain the pears, reserving juice; set the pears aside.
3. Add enough water to the reserved juice to measure 2 cups. Pour into a saucepan; bring to a boil.
4. Remove from the heat; stir in the gelatin mixture and lemon gelatin until completely dissolved.
5. Cool for about 15 minutes.
6. Stir in sour cream and eggnog until well blended.
7. Chill until partially set.
8. Cut the mandarin oranges and pears into chunks; add to eggnog mixture.
9. Pour into an oiled 6-cup mold.
10. Chill until firm.
11. Garnish with orange slices, maraschino cherries, and mint leaves if desired.
